trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 63.5 in the ideal bullish zone, confirmed MACD bullish crossover and rising histogram, price above SMA-20 — cleanest all-green setup in the screener at an affordable price.
Score 95 with RSI 67.5 approaching but not yet overbought, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram confirms strong momentum continuation above SMA-20.
Score 95 with RSI 61.7 showing early-stage momentum — lower RSI leaves more upside room before overbought conditions, MACD bullish crossover confirmed with price well above SMA-20.

decisions.briefing: Markets are essentially flat today with the S&P up just 0.1% and NASDAQ unchanged — a neutral, wait-and-see session with no strong directional catalyst. With 4 open slots and over $1,100 in cash sitting idle, I'm deploying into three of the four score-95 momentum candidates (PATH, FPS, TBBB) that all show RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish zone plus confirmed MACD bullish crossovers. Existing six positions are held as none have triggered stop-loss or profit-target levels.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on May 29 with the S&P 500 adding just 0.1% and the NASDAQ closing flat, as investors adopted a holding pattern ahead of upcoming economic data releases. The subdued session reflects a tug-of-war between ongoing AI and technology optimism and lingering uncertainty about the Federal Reserve's interest rate path into late 2026. Without a fresh macro catalyst, market participants rotated into selective momentum names rather than chasing broad index moves.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年5月29日，美股整體持平，標普500微升0.1%，納斯達克收平，市場在等待下一批重要經濟數據前維持觀望格局。科技與人工智能板塊的樂觀情緒持續，但聯儲局後續利率走向仍存不確定性，令大盤缺乏明確上行動力。在此環境下，資金傾向流入具有明顯技術動能的個股，而非追逐大盤指數整體表現。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on the principle that assets moving in a direction tend to keep moving that way. Technical indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) and MACD help identify stocks with sustained, healthy momentum — ideally RSI between 55–70 (bullish but not yet overbought) paired with a MACD bullish crossover. Today's buys in PATH, FPS, and TBBB all hit this ideal profile, representing the highest-quality setups in the screener.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資策略的核心理念是：已經形成的趨勢往往會延續。投資者透過RSI（相對強弱指數）和MACD等技術指標，篩選出動能穩健的股票——理想情況是RSI介於55至70之間（看漲但未超買），同時MACD出現黃金交叉信號。今日買入的PATH、FPS與TBBB均符合這一條件，是當日技術面最佳的篩選結果。
